question_en: What is an 'Agri-Drone Pilot'? Is it a real job in Chhattisgarh?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Agri-Drone Pilot' kya hota hai? Kya Chhattisgarh mein iski naukri hai?
answer_en: Yes! In 2026, drones are used to spray pesticides and check crop health in large fields. An Agri-Drone Pilot is a trained professional who flies these drones. With government subsidies, many youth in our state are earning well by providing drone services to farmers. It’s a high-tech way to stay connected to the land.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan! 2026 mein bade kheton mein dawai chhidakne aur fasal ki jaanch ke liye drones ka use ho raha hai. Agri-Drone Pilot in drones ko udata hai. Sarkar ki madad se hamare state ke bahut se yuva ye kaam seekhkar accha kama rahe hain. Ye mitti se jude rehne ka ek modern aur high-tech rasta hai.

question_en: Can Organic Farming be a profitable business for an educated student?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya padha-likha baccha Organic Farming se munafa kama sakta hai?
answer_en: Absolutely. Modern organic farming isn't just about growing crops; it’s about 'Branding.' An educated student can grow chemical-free vegetables or grains and sell them directly to cities like Raipur or even export them. It’s no longer just farming; it’s an 'Agri-Startup' with high profit margins.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul. Aaj kal ki organic farming sirf kheti nahi, balki 'Branding' ka khel hai. Padha-likha baccha bina chemical wali fasal uga kar use Raipur jaise shehron mein ya videsh mein direct bech sakta hai. Isme mehnat zaroor hai, par munafa normal kheti se kahin zyada hai.

question_en: What is 'Food Processing'? Can we start a small unit in our village?
question_hi_hinglish: Food Processing kya hai? Kya hum apne gaon mein iska chhota unit daal sakte hain?
answer_en: Food processing means turning raw crops into products, like making chips from potatoes or jam from fruit. Instead of selling crops at low prices, setting up a small processing unit in the village adds value and increases income. The government provides easy loans and training for this under the 'PM Formalisation of Micro food processing Enterprises' scheme.
answer_hi_hinglish: Food Processing ka matlab hai kacchi fasal se naya product banana, jaise aloo se chips ya falon se jam. Sasti fasal bechne ke bajaye gaon mein choti processing unit lagane se income kai guna badh jati hai. Iske liye sarkar 'PM FME' scheme ke tahat sasta loan aur training bhi deti hai.

question_en: What is 'Supply Chain Management'? Is it just about delivery boys?
question_hi_hinglish: Supply Chain Management kya hai? Kya ye sirf delivery ka kaam hai?
answer_en: Not at all. It is the science of moving goods from the factory to the customer. Supply Chain Managers look after huge warehouses, manage inventory, and use AI to plan routes. With companies like Amazon and Flipkart expanding in Chhattisgarh, this is a top-tier management career with high salaries.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul nahi. Ye factory se saaman customer tak pahunchane ki science hai. Supply Chain Managers bade warehouses sambhalte hain aur AI ke zariye raste plan karte hain. Amazon aur Flipkart jaisi companies ke badhne se isme management level par bahut acchi salary wali jobs mil rahi hain.

question_en: My son spends all day on YouTube. Can he become a professional Video Editor?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera beta din bhar YouTube dekhta hai. Kya wo professional Video Editor ban sakta hai?
answer_en: Yes! Video editing is one of the most in-demand skills in 2026. Every business, YouTuber, and news channel needs editors to create catchy videos. It’s a creative job that can be done from home (Freelancing) or in an office, and skilled editors in India are earning very high hourly rates.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan! 2026 mein Video Editing ki demand sabse zyada hai. Har business, YouTuber aur news channel ko acche videos chahiye hote hain. Ye ek creative kaam hai jo baccha ghar baithe (Freelancing) bhi kar sakta hai aur office mein bhi. Isme hunar ke hisaab se bahut accha paisa milta hai.

question_en: Is being a 'Makeup Artist' a stable career for girls today?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya aaj kal ladkiyon ke liye Makeup Artist banna ek stable career hai?
answer_en: In 2026, it is a high-end professional career. Professional makeup artists for weddings, fashion shoots, and movies charge anywhere from ₹15k to ₹50k per day. By doing a professional certification, a girl can start her own studio or work with big brands. It offers great financial independence.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein ye ek bada professional kaam hai. Shaadiyon aur fashion shoots ke liye acche makeup artists din ka ₹15k se ₹50k tak lete hain. Professional course karke bacchi apna studio khol sakti hai ya bade brands ke saath kaam kar sakti hai. Isme ladkiyan bahut jaldi self-dependent ban jati hain.

question_en: What is a 'Nutritionist'? Do they only work in gyms?
question_hi_hinglish: Nutritionist kya hota hai? Kya wo sirf gym mein kaam karte hain?
answer_en: Nutritionists are health experts who tell people what to eat to stay fit or recover from illness. They work in hospitals, schools, and sports teams, and many even consult online. As people become more health-conscious in cities like Bilaspur and Raipur, the demand for certified dieticians is booming.
answer_hi_hinglish: Nutritionist wo hote hain jo logo ko sahi khan-paan ki salah dete hain. Ye sirf gym mein nahi, balki hospitals, schools aur sports teams mein bhi kaam karte hain. Aaj kal shehron mein log health ko lekar jagruk ho rahe hain, isliye certified nutritionists ki demand bahut badh gayi hai.

question_en: Is Dairy Farming still a 'villager's job' or a modern business?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Dairy Farming ab bhi sirf 'gaon ka kaam' hai ya modern business?
answer_en: It is a massive modern industry. With automatic milking machines and data-tracking for cow health, a 'High-Tech Dairy' is very profitable. Organizations like AMUL and local cooperatives have made it easy to sell milk at fixed prices, ensuring a steady daily income for families.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ye ab ek badi modern industry hai. Automatic machines aur cows ki health check karne wali technology se 'High-Tech Dairy' bahut munafa deti hai. AMUL jaise groups ki wajah se doodh bechna asaan ho gaya hai, jisse parivaar ko har din ki fixed income milti rehti hai.
